title: Democratic illusion
description: This Datapack makes the usual players sleep when 50% are in the bed but VIPs just ignore it and override it to 0%(and then resets to 50%)
body:
# Democratic illusion

This datapack makes 'vips' be able to sleep without waiting for other players. When no 'vip' is sleeping only 50% have to sleep. (Other players won't notice if a VIP is sleeping :) )

- Add VIP tag: ```/tag *PLAYER* add vip```  
- Remove VIP tag: ```/tag *PLAYER* remove vip```  

## Installation and uninstallation

In order to install this datapack you have to play on 1.17 or higher. Just drag'n'drop the zip into your datapacks folder.  
To uninstall this pack just remove it(The pack doesn't store anything)

## Credits
- [TryHardSamuel003](https://www.twitch.tv/tryhardsamuel003)
  - Giving me the idea for this datapack
